use_cases: Display status indicators like 'New', 'Sale', or 'Featured' on product cards
Show notification counts or category labels in navigation
Highlight feature tags or plan tiers in pricing sections
Indicate user roles or permissions in dashboard interfaces
Mark items with metadata like 'Popular' or 'Limited' in catalogs
ai_summary: A reusable Badge component with variant support (default, secondary, destructive, outline) built with class-variance-authority for consistent styling across an application. Features border-transparent backgrounds, rounded-full design, and focus ring accessibility. Designed as an atomic UI primitive for displaying labels, status indicators, and metadata tags.
